message:
test(export-pages): avoid swallowing preview stdout during startup sync

- replace the BufReader-based startup helper with exact byte reads so the preview
  tests do not accidentally buffer past the startup banner and hide later stdout
  lines from `wait_with_output()`
- keep the helper focused on the startup banner while preserving the rest of the
  child process output for the assertions that verify clean shutdown messages
- strengthen the workspace-root preview-path regression test to assert that the
  resolved bundle actually serves the expected HTML body, not just that the
  preview process starts successfully
